signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, confirmed via official data release, though below market forecasts of 2.4%.[2] This uptick follows steady 2.0% readings in January and February amid Lunar New Year effects and government price controls on fresh
